languages.text: "Как скажете". {n}Мрачно буркнув в ответ, Батошски не отводит взгляда, пока вы не уйдете.{/n}
"As you wish." {n}Batoshski mutters sourly in reply, then stares after you as you walk away.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Как скажете". {n}Мрачно буркнув в ответ, Батошски не отводит взгляда, пока вы не уйдете.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "As you wish." {n}After grimly muttering his reply, Batoshski stares after you as you walk away.{/n}
"As you wish." {n}Batoshski mutters sourly in reply, then stares after you as you walk away.{/n}

"As you wish." {n}Batoshski mutters sourly in reply, then stares after you as you walk away.{/n}

languages.text: 「ご意向に沿わせていただきます」{n}不吉な口調で返事をするバトシュスキーは、あなたが去っていくのを見つめていた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "As you wish, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}After grimly muttering his reply, Batoshski stares after you as you walk away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ご意向に沿わせていただきます」と、不吉な口調で返事をするバトシュスキーは、あなたが去っていくのを見つめていた。

languages.text: « Entendu, » {n}marmonne-t-il sur un ton amer, en vous fixant du regard pendant que vous vous éloignez.{/n}
languages.original_text: "As you wish." {n}Batoshski mutters sourly in reply, then stares after you as you walk away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Entendu, » {n}marmonne-t-il sur un ton amer, en vous fixant du regard pendant que vous vous éloignez.{/n}

languages.text: "Nasıl dilerseniz." {n}Batoshski, cevap olarak ekşi mırıltılar çıkarıyor. Sonra da sen uzaklaşırken arkandan bakakalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "As you wish." {n}Batoshski mutters sourly in reply, then stares after you as you walk away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Nasıl dilerseniz." {n}Batoshski, cevap olarak ekşi mırıltılar çıkarıyor. Sonra da sen uzaklaşırken arkandan bakakalıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Como desee». {n}Batoshski masculla su sombría respuesta y te sigue con la mirada mientras te alejas.{/n}
languages.original_text: "As you wish." {n}Batoshski mutters sourly in reply, then stares after you as you walk away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Como desee». {n}Batoshski masculla su sombría respuesta y te sigue con la mirada mientras te alejas.{/n}

languages.text: “如您所愿。”{n}巴托什斯基没好气地低声回了一句，然后便目送你离去。{/n}
languages.original_text: "As you wish." {n}Batoshski mutters sourly in reply, then stares after you as you walk away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “如您所愿。”{n}巴托什斯基没好气地低声回了一句，然后便目送你离去。{/n}

languages.text: "Wie Ihr wünscht." {n}Batoshski murmelt missmutig, anstatt zu antworten, und blickt dir lange nach.{/n}
languages.original_text: "As you wish." {n}Batoshski mutters sourly in reply, then stares after you as you walk away.{/n}
